summary: Verified all 5 new features on the contact page: (1) AUTOMATIONS strip with Birthday/Anniversary/Sold Date chips, (2) + button in AUTOMATIONS opens campaign picker, (3) Send Something picker has 7 options including 'Enroll in Campaign' with purple rocket icon, (4) Set as Profile Photo button uses native HTML <button> element on web for better click handling, (5) Contacts without dates (TEST New Contact) do NOT show the AUTOMATIONS strip

automations_strip_for_forest_ward.strip_visible: PASS - AUTOMATIONS section visible below stats row
automations_strip_for_forest_ward.birthday_chip: PASS - Birthday chip shows 'May 30' with pink gift icon
automations_strip_for_forest_ward.anniversary_chip: PASS - Anniversary chip shows 'Nov 5' with red heart icon
automations_strip_for_forest_ward.sold_date_chip: PASS - Sold Date chip shows 'May 8' with green car icon
automations_strip_for_forest_ward.add_button: PASS - Blue + button present to add campaigns

automations_strip_add_button.opens_campaign_picker: PASS - Clicking + button opens 'Enroll in Campaign' modal
automations_strip_add_button.campaign_picker_shows_campaigns: PASS - Shows available campaigns (e.g., 'Updated Test Campaign with Card - 1 steps')

send_something_picker_7_options.picker_opens: PASS - Send Something modal opens when clicking blue + button in composer

options.my_digital_card: PASS - Blue person-circle icon, 'Share your business card link'
options.create_a_card: PASS - Gold palette icon, 'Pick a template to send'
options.review_link: PASS - Yellow star icon, 'Request a review'
options.my_showcase: PASS - Orange images icon, 'Share your showcase page'
options.my_link_page: PASS - Purple link icon, 'Share your link page'
options.photo: PASS - Blue camera icon, 'Take or upload a photo'
options.enroll_in_campaign: PASS - Purple rocket icon, 'Add to an active campaign'

enroll_in_campaign_option.option_present: PASS - 'Enroll in Campaign' is 7th option in Send Something picker
enroll_in_campaign_option.opens_campaign_picker: PASS - Opens same campaign enrollment modal as AUTOMATIONS + button

contact_without_dates.automations_strip_hidden: PASS - AUTOMATIONS strip NOT shown for contacts without dates
contact_without_dates.no_date_chips: PASS - No Birthday/Anniversary/Sold Date chips displayed

set_as_profile_photo_button.button_visible: PASS - Button appears when viewing non-profile photo in gallery
set_as_profile_photo_button.uses_native_html_button: PASS - Uses <button> element (not TouchableOpacity) on web
set_as_profile_photo_button.button_styling: PASS - Gold background (rgb(201, 169, 98)), black text, cursor:pointer

photo_viewer_gallery.opens_on_avatar_click: PASS - Gallery modal opens when clicking contact avatar
photo_viewer_gallery.shows_photo_count: PASS - Shows '9 photos' for Forest Ward
photo_viewer_gallery.all_photos_button: PASS - 'All Photos' button returns to gallery grid

verified_features.automations_strip_with_date_chips: Birthday (May 30), Anniversary (Nov 5), Sold Date (May 8) displayed as colored chips
verified_features.send_something_7_options: All 7 options present including new 'Enroll in Campaign'
verified_features.set_as_profile_photo_native_button: Uses HTML <button> on web for better click handling
verified_features.conditional_automations_display: AUTOMATIONS strip only shows for contacts with dates

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features verified working: (1) AUTOMATIONS strip shows date-based automations (Birthday/Anniversary/Sold Date) as colored chips with dates for contacts that have them, (2) + button in AUTOMATIONS opens campaign enrollment modal, (3) Send Something picker has 7 options including 'Enroll in Campaign' with purple rocket icon, (4) Set as Profile Photo button uses native HTML <button> on web with gold styling, (5) Contacts without dates (like TEST New Contact) correctly do NOT show the AUTOMATIONS strip. Photo gallery viewer works with navigation and 'All Photos' button.

mocked_api.twilio_sms: MOCKED - Personal SMS flow opens native SMS app instead of sending via Twilio
